name: Sherried Lobster Bisque
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut lengthwise through the top of one lobster shell.
2. Press the shell open.
3. Starting at the cut end of the tail, carefully loosen the lobster meat from the bottom of the shell. Coarsely chop and set aside. Repeat with the other tail.
4. Combine potatoes and onion, garlic, water, and clam juice in a saucepan. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer covered for 12 minutes or until tender. Set aside.
6. Position the knife blade in the processor; add potato mixture. Process until smooth. Return 1 cup of the potato mixture to the saucepan.
7. Add sour cream, stirring well.
8. Add the remaining potato mixture; stir well.
9. Place over low heat and add lobster, thyme, pepper, and dry sherry. Cook for 8 minutes or until the lobster is done, stirring constantly.
